issues.description: DSL is missing the first effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) a Counter/Trigger effect during opponent's turn that gives Leader −2000 power, and (2) the DON!! x1 OnAttack effect. Only the second effect is present.
Trigger should be 'Counter' (triggered by opponent's effect removing a Supernovas Character), not 'OnAttack'
Missing condition for Supernovas type Character being targeted for removal. Should include LeaderHasType or card type check, plus the 'Once Per Turn' limit
Action targets opponent's Character but should target your own Leader (give Leader −2000 power)
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text specifies '[Opponent's Turn]' — should be 'DuringOpponentTurn'
'ChooseOpponentCharacter' allows free choice; text says 'up to 1' which is correct but scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' with count limit of 1
